run_purpose: Observe Packet Tracer deterministic extraction; not pass/fail product proof.

cases.expected_behavior: Readable legacy .pkt; topology_detected true; ip_configurations_detected true; device_count >= 4; routers/switches/PCs present; static_routes_detected and RIP in routing_protocols; evidence_type packet_tracer_topology in evidence_layer.
Empty .pkt: readable false; pkt_empty_or_unreadable or decode failure; topology_detected false; unreadable evidence row or zero devices.
Devices/topology without IP tags: topology_detected true; ip_configurations_detected false; noise flag topology_without_ip_configuration.
RIP/static route markers without interface strings: static_routes_detected or routing_protocols present; interfaces_detected 0; noise flag routing_without_interfaces.
Random bytes: decode fails; readable false; topology_detected false; pkt_decode_failed noise.
